articles.title: Life expectancy gap for Black Bostonians is growing, health officials warn
articles.description:
From 2013 to 2024, the 3.3-year gap more than doubled to 6.6 years. Black life expectancy is 76.2 years, while the rest of Boston’s is 82.2.

The post Life expectancy gap for Black Bostonians is growing, health officials warn appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Life expectancy gap for Black Bostonians increased from 3.3 to 6.6 years since 2013.
Current life expectancy for Black residents is 76.2 years compared to 82.2 years for others.
Health officials warn this growing disparity poses significant public health challenges for Boston.

articles.title: Former Celtics center Luke Kornet calls out Hawks over ‘Magic City’ promotion
articles.description:
The NBA should desire to protect and esteem women, many of whom work diligently every day to make this the best basketball league in the world."

The post Former Celtics center Luke Kornet calls out Hawks over ‘Magic City’ promotion appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Luke Kornet criticizes Atlanta Hawks for promoting 'Magic City' strip club event.
Kornet emphasizes the need for the NBA to respect women in the league.
The controversy raises awareness about women's roles in sports among Boston fans.

articles.title: Married couple from R.I. identified as victims in fatal Swansea crash
articles.description:
The two victims were identified as a husband and wife from Rhode Island, local officials said.

The post Married couple from R.I. identified as victims in fatal Swansea crash appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Identify victims: a married couple from Rhode Island involved in a fatal crash.
Local officials confirmed the couple's identities on March 2, 2026.
The crash raises concerns about road safety in the Swansea area for Boston residents.

articles.title: Steve Kerr apologizes for comments about Kristaps Porzingis’ lingering illness
articles.description:
"He’s sick. He won’t play. We will keep monitoring him.”

summary: Steve Kerr apologized for comments regarding Kristaps Porzingis' illness affecting his play.
Porzingis remains sidelined as the Celtics monitor his health closely.
Boston residents may see changes in Celtics' lineup due to Porzingis' ongoing condition.

articles.title: Celtics spoil Giannis Antetokounmpo’s return, trouncing Bucks 108-81 without Jaylen Brown
articles.description:
Boston was missing five-time All-Star Jaylen Brown due to an illness.

The post Celtics spoil Giannis Antetokounmpo’s return, trouncing Bucks 108-81 without Jaylen Brown appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics defeated Bucks 108-81 on March 2, 2026, without Jaylen Brown.
Giannis Antetokounmpo returned but couldn't prevent the loss for Milwaukee.
Boston's victory boosts team morale and playoff positioning amid injuries.
